jakR2 0.4.2
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Color defaults

Source: R/themes.R
jak_color.Rd

Sets default colors for text, axes, panel border, and geom aesthetics. Uses element_geom() (requires ggplot2 >= 4.0.0) to set the default outline color for filled shapes (pch 21-25).

Usage

jak_color(
  base_color = "gray30",
  plot_title_color = "gray30",
  axis_title_color = "gray30",
  border_width = 0.5,
  outline_color = base_color
)

Arguments

base_color

Base color for text and borders. Default "gray30".

plot_title_color

Color for plot title. Default "gray30".

axis_title_color

Color for axis titles. Default "gray30".

border_width

Panel border line width. Default 0.5.

outline_color

Default outline/border color for filled geom shapes (pch 21-25). Default "gray70".

Value

A ggplot2 theme object
